title: Beginner question - Run code without third party app

posts.author: cornel.eftimie (Cornel Eftimie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I have a beginner’s question. Is there any possibility to run some code on monday.com app without any third party app?
For instance, to run a query to create an item in a certain board when I change a certain status.

Thanks

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, @cornel.eftimie.
It might be a little bit late to the party, but monday.com offers some nice automations out of the box. You can try the following one “When status changes to something, create an item in another board and link them in the selected board”.
